← Demo home

Playground

Two rivals, one heart — a MarkdyScript short story. (~24 seconds)

▶ markdy

Story acts

  1. 0s Two rivals enter and spot the girl
  2. 2.6s Both declare their love
  3. 6.3s Girl steps back — rivals charge
  4. 7.5s They fight!
  5. 9.3s Guy2 is knocked out
  6. 11s Winner offers a flower…
  7. 13.2s Girl rejects him
  8. 17.5s Girl comforts the loser
  9. 22.5s Winner watches from afar 😔
View MarkdyScript source 
scene width=900 height=460 fps=30 bg=#fef3ff

asset flower = image("/memes/flower.png")

actor guy1 = text("🧔") at (760,175) size 70
actor guy2 = text("👱") at (60,175) size 70
actor girl = text("👧") at (400,175) size 70 opacity 0

# -- Introduction --
@0.0: girl.fade_in(dur=0.6)
@0.8: guy1.enter(from=right, dur=1.0)
@1.1: guy2.enter(from=left, dur=1.0)

# -- Both declare love --
@2.6: guy1.say("I love you! 😍", dur=1.4)
@3.2: guy2.say("She's mine! 😤", dur=1.4)

@5.0: girl.say("Oh my... 😳", dur=1.2)

# -- Girl steps aside, rivals charge --
@6.3: girl.move(to=(750,175), dur=0.5, ease=out)
@6.7: guy1.move(to=(440,175), dur=0.6, ease=in)
@6.7: guy2.move(to=(330,175), dur=0.6, ease=in)

# -- They fight --
@7.5: guy1.shake(intensity=14, dur=0.6)
@7.5: guy2.shake(intensity=14, dur=0.6)
@8.2: guy1.shake(intensity=10, dur=0.5)
@8.2: guy2.shake(intensity=7, dur=0.4)
@8.8: guy2.shake(intensity=4, dur=0.3)

# -- Guy2 loses --
@9.3: guy2.move(to=(330,320), dur=0.4, ease=in)
@9.3: guy2.fade_out(dur=0.5)
@9.3: guy1.say("I win!! 💪", dur=1.4)

# -- Guy1 approaches girl with flower --
@11.0: guy1.move(to=(575,175), dur=0.8, ease=out)
@12.1: guy1.throw(flower, to=girl, dur=0.9)

# -- Girl rejects --
@13.2: girl.say("I don't like you 🙅", dur=2.0)
@13.3: girl.shake(intensity=7, dur=0.5)
@15.5: guy1.say("But I fought for you! 😢", dur=1.6)
@15.7: guy1.move(to=(820,175), dur=1.2, ease=in)

# -- Girl goes to comfort the loser --
@17.5: guy2.fade_in(dur=0.8)
@17.8: girl.move(to=(410,175), dur=0.5, ease=out)
@18.7: girl.move(to=(340,295), dur=1.0, ease=inout)
@20.0: girl.say("Are you okay? 💕", dur=2.0)
@20.4: guy2.say("Yeah... thanks 🥺", dur=1.8)

# -- Guy1 watches from afar --
@22.5: guy1.say("...why 😔", dur=1.5)
